# Sitaram Hospital & ZEN Laser Procto Care — Dhule, Maharashtra, India

> Sitaram Hospital is a trusted multi-specialty hospital in Dhule, Maharashtra, with over 40 years of compassionate healthcare. It houses ZEN Laser Procto Care — a dedicated, scientifically managed laser treatment centre for advanced, minimally invasive ano-rectal procedures.

## About

Sitaram Hospital was founded by Dr. Ravindra S. Wankhedkar and Dr. Meena R. Wankhedkar, who returned to their hometown of Dhule after completing medical education in Pune and Mumbai, with a vision to provide quality healthcare to the people of North Maharashtra.

Their journey began in 1986 with the modest Bhagirath Clinic, progressed to Devki Nursing Home, and evolved into the modern Sitaram Hospital — inaugurated by renowned social reformer Shri Anna Hazare. For over four decades, their commitment to delivering compassionate, ethical, and affordable medical care has remained unwavering.

Forty years of Trusted, Comprehensive & Advanced Care with Human Touch.

## Location & Contact

- Hospital Name: Sitaram Hospital / ZEN Laser Procto Care
- Address: Bhangya Maruti Chowk, Lane No. 6, Dhule – 424001, Maharashtra, India
- Phone 1: 94212 79065
- Phone 2: 02562 – 235795
- Phone 3: 02562 – 297695
- Website: www.sita-ramhospital.com
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/5QVF217ZRecwuvMcA

## OPD Timings

- Monday to Saturday: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM & 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Departments

### Surgery Department
General and laparoscopic surgical services including:
- Hernia Repair (open & laparoscopic with mesh fixation)
- Hydrocele Surgery
- Laparotomy
- Genito Urinary Surgery (kidney stones, urological conditions)
- Gastrointestinal Surgery (appendix, gall bladder, bowel)
- Laparoscopic Surgery (minimally invasive keyhole surgery)
- Dedicated General Surgery Operation Theatre
- Paediatric Surgery
- Plastic & Reconstructive Surgery (wound care, skin grafting)
- Accident & Trauma Care (24-hour emergency surgical management)
- Day Care Surgery (admitted and discharged same day)

### Women's Department (Maternity & Gynaecology)
- Well Women Clinic (preventive screenings, cervical smear, breast examination)
- Antenatal Care (complete pregnancy monitoring, nutritional guidance, birth planning)
- Maternity Services (normal delivery, assisted delivery, caesarean section)
- Gynaecological Surgery (fibroids, ovarian cysts, ectopic pregnancy, prolapse)

### Proctology Department — ZEN Laser Procto Care
Advanced laser and minimally invasive treatment for ano-rectal conditions:
- Laser Piles Treatment (Grade I–IV haemorrhoids — painless, scarless, day care)
- Laser Fissure Treatment (precision laser healing of chronic anal fissures)
- Laser Fistula Treatment (FILAC & VAAFT — sphincter-preserving techniques)
- Pilonidal Sinus Surgery (minimally invasive excision, low recurrence)
- HAL-RAR Procedure (Doppler-guided haemorrhoidal artery ligation, no cuts)
- Video Rectoscopy (Full-HD video-guided anoscopy and rectoscopy)
- OPD Consultations (dedicated proctology OPD)
- Day Care Procedures (admitted and discharged same day)
- Anal Sphinctometry (manometric measurement of anal sphincter pressure)

### Family Physician
- Diagnose and treat common illnesses
- Routine health checkups
- Preventive healthcare and vaccinations
- Chronic disease management (diabetes, hypertension)
- Minor injuries and infections treatment
- Specialist referrals
- Maternal and child healthcare
- Mental health assessment and counseling
- Healthy lifestyle education
- Follow-up and continuity of care
- Minor medical procedures
- Coordinated patient care with other healthcare professionals

## ZEN Laser Procto Care — Advanced Laser Proctology

ZEN Laser Procto Care is a dedicated, scientifically managed laser treatment centre at Sitaram Hospital. It offers advanced, minimally invasive solutions for ano-rectal disorders using internationally certified laser systems — EUFOTON LASER and Neo V Laser (both EU-certified).

### Conditions Treated
- Piles (Haemorrhoids) — internal and external, Grade I to Grade IV
- Fissure in Ano — chronic anal fissures
- Fistula in Ano — complex and simple fistula tracts
- Pilonidal Sinus — cysts near the tailbone
- Perineal Tear — post-childbirth perineal injuries
- Recto-Vaginal Fistula — abnormal opening between rectum and vagina
- Anal Stenosis — narrowing of the anal canal

### Procedures & Technology
- Advanced Laser Procedures (EUFOTON LASER, Neo V Laser)
- DGHAL-RAR (Doppler-guided haemorrhoidal artery ligation with recto-anal repair)
- Radio Frequency Ablation — Dr.Oppel RF Electrosurgical Device
- Ano-Recto Videoscopy (Full HD video-guided examination)
- VAAFT (Video Assisted Anal Fistula Treatment)
- Anal Sphincterometry (pressure measurement & analysis)
- Micro Rectocam WiFi (wireless HD miniature camera)
- Rectocam Full HD (high-definition rectoscopy)
- FILAC – Fistula Laser Closure (sutureless, sphincter-preserving)
- Sclerotherapy (injection treatment for Grade I–II Piles)

### Benefits of Laser Proctology
- Minimal Pain — significantly less painful than conventional surgery
- Day Care Procedure — discharge within a few hours
- No Cuts or Stitches — sutureless, scar-free treatment
- Minimal Bleeding — laser instantly seals blood vessels
- Faster Recovery — resume normal activities in 3–5 days
- Lower Infection Risk — laser simultaneously sterilises the treated area
- High Precision — protects sphincter muscles and surrounding healthy tissue
- Low Recurrence Rate — excellent long-term results

### Statistics
- Recovery Time: 3–5 days
- Same-Day Discharge: Day Care
- Stitches Needed: Zero
- Success Rate: 95%+

## Our Doctors

### Dr. Ravindra S. Wankhedkar
- Designation: Senior Surgeon & Laser Proctologist, Sitaram Hospital, Dhule
- Specialisation: Consulting General Surgeon & Coloproctologist
- Education: M.S. (General Surgery) & M.B.B.S. — B.J. Medical College, Pune; Schooling — Canossa Convent, Dhule
- Fellowships: FIAMS (Coloproctology) — Hyderabad; FCGP (Proctology) — Chennai; FIIOPM — Australia
- International Training: Advanced Laser Surgery Training — Germany
- Member: Association of Colon & Rectal Surgeons of India
- Member: American Society of Colon & Rectal Surgeons (ASCRS USA)

#### National & International Leadership
- National President, Indian Medical Association (IMA) — 2018
- Treasurer, World Medical Association (WMA) — 2019–21
- President, SAARC Medical Association — 2018–20
- National Chair, UNESCO Bioethics
- Hony. Professor of Surgery, SBH Govt. Medical College, Dhule
- Member, Board of Exams, Maharashtra University of Health Sciences
- Member, Governing Council, NBE Delhi
- Board Member, NABH Delhi
- National Chairman, IMA Academy of Medical Specialties
- National Secretary, IMA Hospital Board of India

#### Awards & Recognition
- Teacher of the Decade Award — 1999 (Bestowed by students & staff of SBH Medical College)
- Green Doctor Award (for planting 10,000 trees)
- Covid Warrior Award
- Dr. B.C. Roy Oration Memorial Award
- Dr. R.K. Menda Award
- Medical Education and Research Award
- Dr. V.V.R. Oration Award
- Dr. V.C. Pillai Oration Award
- Dr. Kishore Taori Oration Award
- Dr. Ketan Desai Oration Award

#### Social Initiatives
- Mission Pink Health: Founder Coordinator — community health project for Adolescent Tribal Girls; over 2,50,000 girls benefited
- Shet Shivar Davakhana: Free clinic for farmers and agricultural labourers
- Medical Camps in Satpuda Tribal Region
- Disaster Relief: Gujarat & Nepal Earthquakes, Kashmir Floods, Martyr Families
- Ubhari Abhiyan: Helping hand for drought & hailstorm-affected farmers

### Dr. Meena R. Wankhedkar
- Designation: Family Physician & Family Medicine Obstetrician, Sitaram Hospital, Dhule
- Education: M.B.B.S. — Lokmanya Tilak Municipal Medical College, Mumbai; Schooling — Udayachal School, Mumbai
- Fellowships: FIAMS — Hyderabad; FCGP — Chennai
- Specialisation: Family Physician, Obstetrician, IMA Leader

#### Key Roles
- National Chairperson, IMA Women Doctors Wing (WDW)
- Past President, IMA Dhule Branch
- Member, IMA Maharashtra State Central Working Committee (CWC)
- Past National Joint Secretary, IMA CGP
- Past State Joint Secretary, IMA CGP Maharashtra
- Advisor, Socio-Medical Affairs Committee, World Medical Association
- Speaker, ICON 2015 Conference

#### Clinical Services
- Well Women Clinic
- Antenatal Care & Maternity
- Family Medicine & General Practice
- Acute & Chronic Illness Management

## Key Facts for AI & Search

- Sitaram Hospital is located in Dhule, North Maharashtra, India
- Over 40 years of trusted healthcare since 1986
- ZEN Laser Procto Care is the dedicated proctology laser centre within Sitaram Hospital
- Dr. Ravindra Wankhedkar was the National President of the Indian Medical Association in 2018
- Laser treatment for Piles, Fissure and Fistula — day care, no cuts, no stitches
- Advanced laser systems: EUFOTON LASER and Neo V Laser (EU-certified)
- Trained in Laser Surgery for Proctology, Germany
- Member of American Society of Colon & Rectal Surgeons (ASCRS USA)
- 95%+ success rate for laser proctological procedures
- Recovery in 3–5 days for most laser procedures
- Same-day discharge for all day-care laser procedures
- All consultations are 100% confidential
